title: Add city and state with zip code to technician search

requirements.text: Add city and state fields to the Technician type in the backend schema alongside the existing zipCode field

quotes: add to the search icon city and or state with zip code

acceptanceCriteria: Backend Technician type includes city field of type Text
Backend Technician type includes state field of type Text

requirements.text: Update the TechnicianFinder search interface to display city and state alongside zip code for each technician result

quotes: add to the search icon city and or state with zip code

acceptanceCriteria: Technician search results show city name when available
Technician search results show state when available
Display format clearly presents zip code, city, and state together (e.g., 'City, State ZIP')
Gracefully handles missing city or state data

requirements.text: Generate a migration to add city and state fields to existing technician records with appropriate default values
acceptanceCriteria: Migration successfully adds city and state fields to all existing technician records
Default values are set appropriately for existing records without data loss

constraints: Maintain backward compatibility with existing technician data
Do not modify the existing zipCode search functionality
nonGoals: Implementing search by city or state (only display is required)
Validating city/state data against external APIs
